text.message: Any suggestions? This is an awful first pick board..
I think it’s going to work for you red.

Yeah thought you take 8 10 if your spot was taken
I wouldn’t but green didnt take the higher wheat spot
Yeah thats how i thought it would play out
block 10 wood i mean when you can
Red isnt trying to win with road
But I guess 3 roads is a win
yeah that's what i was worried about
Back to back knight 7 double robs… good night
Funny part was he robbed the wrong person..
